step_rationale: Polyol; systemic metabolic marker; off-pathway CHD risk.
mechanism: Erythritol is a polyol metabolite associated with coronary heart disease risk via systemic carbohydrate metabolism dysregulation.

references.title: Plasma Metabolic Profiling and Multiclass Diagnostic Model Development for Stable Angina Pectoris and Acute Myocardial Infarction.
